muster_station.label: Muster Station
muster_station.value: Muster Station E5 — The Local Bar, Deck 8
muster_station.note: Your assigned muster station is E5, located at The Local Bar on Deck 8. Drill is mandatory on embarkation day.

suite_phone.label: Suite Extension
suite_phone.note: Dial your room number from any ship phone to reach suite 12846

haven_concierge.label: Haven Concierge
haven_concierge.phone: Dial extension listed on Haven welcome card in suite
haven_concierge.note: Available during Haven hours. For after-hours, contact Guest Services.

wifi.label: Wi-Fi Login
wifi.note: Login page opens automatically. Use the access code from your cruise confirmation or the card in your suite. Haven guests receive complimentary Wi-Fi — use the code on your Haven welcome letter.

emergency_number.label: Ship Emergency
emergency_number.note: For fire, medical emergency, or man overboard
